extracted.full_content:
🚀 Hiring: AI Engineer (Snowflake + RAG)
📍 Location: Work From Anywhere
📄 Job Type: Contract (Full-Time)
⏳ Duration: 3 Months
💼 Experience: 5 – 8 Years
💡 Role Overview
We are looking for an AI Engineer with strong experience in Snowflake Data Warehouse and AI-driven analytics. The role involves building scalable data pipelines and contributing to AI-powered applications like conversational analytics using Snowflake Cortex LLM.
🛠️ Mandatory Skills
✔ RAG Frameworks (5–8 Years)
✔ Snowflake (5–8 Years)
⭐ Good to Have
✔ Power BI (3–5 Years)
✔ Tableau (3–5 Years)
✔ Python (3–5 Years)
🔧 Key Responsibilities
📊 1. Snowflake Data Engineering
Develop data models (Star / Snowflake schema)
Build & optimize ELT pipelines
Write efficient SQL queries & transformations
Handle structured & semi-structured data ingestion
Optimize warehouse performance & cost
Implement RBAC & governance
🤖 2. AI & Cortex LLM Support
Build AI agents using Snowflake Cortex LLM
Work on RAG workflows & vector embeddings
Assist in prompt engineering & testing
Validate AI outputs for accuracy & security
💬 3. Conversational Analytics
Develop natural language query-based analytics tools
Integrate with Power BI / Tableau
Translate business KPIs into dashboards
Ensure data accuracy & performance
🤝 4. Collaboration & Delivery
Work with architects & senior stakeholders
Participate in Agile/sprint planning
Maintain documentation
Provide production support
🎯 Required Qualifications
✔ 5–7 years in Data / Analytics Engineering
✔ 3–4 years hands-on experience in Snowflake
✔ Strong SQL expertise (joins, window functions, tuning)
✔ Working knowledge of Python
✔ Strong data modeling concepts
➕ Preferred Skills
✔ Exposure to RAG / semantic search
✔ Knowledge of data governance & security
✔ Experience with JSON, Parquet
✔ Domain exposure (HR / Sales / Finance / Supply Chain)
📩 How to Apply
📧 joyitadas@acbhiring.com

📱 9007847594
🔗 Immediate joiners preferred – Tag & share with relevant candidates!

Business Analyst | Tech & Talent Connector HRBP | Driving Impact at The AI Matters

📌 Job Title: Forward Deployment Engineer – GTM AI
📍 Location:  (Remote)
💰 Rate: ₹ 2,00,000 / Month
⏳ Duration: 6–12 Months Contract
🕒 Experience: 5–10 Years


---

🧾 Role Overview

We are hiring a Forward Deployment Engineer (GTM AI) to work closely with Sales, RevOps, and Customer Success teams. This is a highly execution-driven role focused on building and deploying AI-powered solutions that directly impact revenue and business outcomes.


---

⏰ Work Timings

11:00 AM – 11:00 PM (Flexible 3–4 hour break)
Must be available for late evening client calls


---

🚀 Key Responsibilities

Design and deploy production-grade AI solutions in fast-paced sprints

Identify automation opportunities with business teams

Integrate AI systems with GTM tools (Salesforce, Gong, Outreach)

Build AI agents and workflows to improve productivity

Translate technical solutions into measurable business impact

Ensure system reliability via monitoring and quality checks



---

✅ Requirements

4+ years of experience in software/product engineering

Hands-on experience with Salesforce and GTM tools

Strong experience with AI/LLM-based workflows

Understanding of Sales, Customer Success, and GTM processes

Experience with system integrations and event-driven architecture

Strong communication and stakeholder management skills



---

⭐ Nice to Have

Experience in SalesTech / revenue-focused platforms

Exposure to AI production and automation systems

Experience building internal tools and data-driven workflows



---

🛠️ Primary Skills

Salesforce & GTM | AI/LLM | Sales | Customer Success | GTM Processes
